class.name: FmodAudioStreamPlayer2D
class.brief_description: A 2D node for playing FMOD audio streams with spatial audio support.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamPlayer2D is a 2D node that plays [FmodAudioStream] resources using the FMOD audio engine. It provides spatial audio capabilities in 2D environments, with distance-based attenuation and panning relative to the camera/listener. Key features: - 2D spatial audio with distance attenuation - Automatic panning based on position relative to camera - Configurable max distance and attenuation curve - Panning strength control - Area mask for filtering by physics layers - Stream playback with play/pause/stop/seek controls - Volume and pitch control - Bus routing for mixing This node is ideal for 2D games where audio needs to be positioned in the game world and respond to the player's location.

method.name: get_area_mask
method.description: Returns the area mask used for physics-based audio filtering. The default value is [code]1[/code] (first layer).

method.name: get_attenuation
method.description: Returns the current attenuation factor. Higher values make the sound fade more quickly with distance.

method.name: get_bus
method.description: Returns the name of the audio bus this player outputs to. The default value is [code]&"Master"[/code].

method.name: get_max_distance
method.description: Returns the maximum distance in pixels at which the sound is audible. Beyond this distance, the volume is set to minimum. The default value is [code]2000.0[/code] pixels.

method.name: get_max_polyphony
method.description: Returns the maximum number of simultaneous voices this player can play. The default value is [code]1[/code].

method.name: get_panning_strength
method.description: Returns the current panning strength multiplier. Higher values create more pronounced left/right panning. The default value is [code]1.0[/code].

method.name: get_pitch_scale
method.description: Returns the current pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch, [code]0.5[/code] is one octave lower, [code]2.0[/code] is one octave higher.

method.name: get_playback_position
method.description: Returns the current playback position in seconds. Returns [code]0.0[/code] if not playing.

method.name: get_stream
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioStream] currently assigned to this player. Returns [code]null[/code] if no stream is set.

method.name: get_stream_paused
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream playback is currently paused.

method.name: get_stream_playback
method.description: Returns the internal [FmodChannel] used for playback. Returns [code]null[/code] if no channel is active. This can be used for advanced control over the playing sound.

method.name: get_volume_db
method.description: Returns the current volume in decibels. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB (unity gain).

method.name: get_volume_linear
method.description: Returns the current volume as a linear value (0.0 to 1.0+). Converts from the internal dB value.

method.name: has_stream_playback
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a stream playback channel is currently active.

method.name: is_autoplay_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if autoplay is enabled. When enabled, playback starts automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: is_playing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if audio is currently playing. Note that this returns [code]false[/code] when paused, even though playback is active.

method.name: play
method.description: Starts playing the assigned stream from the specified position in seconds. If [param from_position] is negative, playback starts from the beginning.

method.name: preload_stream
method.description: Preloads the assigned stream by creating its internal [FmodSound] before playback starts. This reduces first-play latency when the stream is later played.

method.name: seek
method.description: Seeks to the specified position in seconds during playback. This can be called while playing or paused.

method.name: set_area_mask
method.description: Sets the area mask for physics-based audio filtering. Only areas matching this mask will affect this player's audio.

method.name: set_attenuation
method.description: Sets the attenuation factor controlling how quickly sound fades with distance. [code]1.0[/code] is linear attenuation. Higher values cause faster fade-out.

method.name: set_autoplay
method.description: Enables or disables autoplay. When enabled, the stream starts playing automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: set_bus
method.description: Sets the audio bus to route this player's output to. The bus name should match a bus in the [FmodAudioBusLayout].

method.name: set_max_distance
method.description: Sets the maximum distance in pixels at which the sound is audible. Beyond this distance, the volume is set to minimum (-80 dB).

method.name: set_max_polyphony
method.description: Sets the maximum number of simultaneous voices this player can play.

method.name: set_panning_strength
method.description: Sets the panning strength multiplier. Higher values create more pronounced left/right panning effect. Set to [code]0.0[/code] to disable panning.

method.name: set_pitch_scale
method.description: Sets the pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is normal pitch. Higher values increase pitch and playback speed.

method.name: set_playing
method.description: Controls playback state. Setting to [code]true[/code] starts playback from the beginning. Setting to [code]false[/code] stops playback.

method.name: set_stream
method.description: Sets the [FmodAudioStream] to play. The stream can be changed during playback, which will stop the current playback and start the new stream if playing.

method.name: set_stream_paused
method.description: Pauses or resumes playback without changing position.

method.name: set_preload_on_set_stream
method.description: If enabled, assigning [member stream] immediately preloads it.

method.name: is_preload_on_set_stream_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if streams are preloaded as soon as they are assigned.

method.name: set_volume_db
method.description: Sets the volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain. Negative values attenuate, positive values amplify (if supported).

method.name: set_volume_linear
method.description: Sets the volume as a linear value (0.0 to 1.0+). This is converted internally to decibels.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops playback and resets the position to the beginning.

members.member: Physics layer mask for area-based audio filtering.
Attenuation factor controlling how quickly sound fades with distance.
If [code]true[/code], audio plays automatically when the node enters the scene tree.
The name of the audio bus to route output to.
Maximum distance in pixels at which the sound is audible.
Maximum number of simultaneous voices this player can play.
Multiplier for the panning effect strength.
Pitch scale of the audio. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch.
Current playback state. Can be set to start/stop playback.
If [code]true[/code], assigning a stream creates its internal [FmodSound] immediately instead of waiting for the first playback.
Volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain, negative values attenuate.

signal.name: finished
signal.description: Emitted when playback finishes (reaches the end of the stream).
